# .github/public-exclude.txt
# Authoritative blacklist for the public repo snapshot.
# Used by the git archive workflow in docs/guides/two-remote-sync.md.
# Paths relative to repo root. Applied: rm -rf /tmp/release/$pattern
# NOTE: glob patterns need a separate rm -f step (see workflow).

# Brand-specific skills
.claude/skills/sd-brand-guidelines
.claude/skills/linkedin-carousel
.claude/skills/linkedin-post
.claude/skills/linkedin-script
.claude/skills/linkedin-shared

# Brand-specific commands
.claude/commands/demo.md

# All private feature docs — clean slate for public users
docs/features

# Private research, guides, and working docs
docs/research
docs/guides/creating-branded-presentations.md

# PPTX HTML build sources (compiled .pptx stays; raw HTML sources are internal)
docs/system/pptx-workspace

# Personal workspace files (committed before .gitignore entry was added)
workspace

# Runtime files — gitignored but listed as safety backstop
.claude/logs/agent.db
.claude/logs/security.log
.claude/session-state.json
.claude/settings.local.json
